title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Optimized search and filter modules in an OutSystems Real Estate Management System (REMS) by overhauling keyword input processing, resulting in a 30% gain in query performance.
Spearheaded testing and development within an agile environment, collaborating with engineers and business analysts to troubleshoot bugs, regather requirements, and optimize workflows.
Proactively reviewed policy revisions and tenancy inspection processes, ensuring full compliance with scrum and business objectives.
